sentences.base_language: Today we want to explore the city.
First, we go to the museum downtown.
sentences.target_language: Primero, vamos al museo en el centro.

sentences.base_language: The museum is between the park and the library.
sentences.target_language: El museo está entre el parque y la biblioteca.

sentences.base_language: After the museum, we have lunch at a nearby restaurant.
sentences.target_language: Después del museo, almorzamos en un restaurante cercano.
sentences.grammarNote: 'Después de + noun' = after [something]. 'Después del museo' (after the museum) — 'del' = de + el. When followed by a verb, use an infinitive: 'después de comer' (after eating). Both patterns are very common.

sentences.base_language: The restaurant is full, so we go to the cafe.
sentences.target_language: El restaurante está lleno, así que vamos al café.

sentences.base_language: In the afternoon, we walk through the park.
sentences.target_language: Por la tarde, caminamos por el parque.
sentences.grammarNote: 'Por' has many uses: time of day ('por la tarde' = in the afternoon), movement through a space ('caminar por el parque' = walk through the park), cause ('por eso' = because of that), and exchange ('gracias por todo' = thanks for everything).

sentences.base_language: The park is next to the river.
sentences.target_language: El parque está al lado del río.

sentences.base_language: We take a lot of photos.
In the evening, we head back to the hotel.
sentences.target_language: Por la noche, nos dirigimos de vuelta al hotel.
